name: Palladise Island：Legendary Space
short_description: Palladise Island: Legendary Space It tells the story of the game master in the real world, who is transmitted to another world called Palladise because of his superb game technology, and then starts the journey to save the Palladise.
detailed_description:
Background Story

《Palladise Island: Legendary Space》 is an easy and fun RPG. The player is transmitted to another world called Palladise by the mysterious doctor because of his super game skills. In Palladise, players will embark on the adventure of saving the world together with their new partner "PA".

There are many amazing creatures in Palladise, which are called "PA". Since ancient times, people and PAs have lived together in Palladise, and the most representative of them is the "PA trainer". In the dark place of the Palladise, an evil force is rising.This organization, called "Aliens", attempts to open the gate of space-time, disrupt the balance between the various worlds, and take the opportunity to rule the whole world. Just like the fable in the legend, the key to closing the gate of space-time is the "Fetters Power". Only by defeating the powerful trainer leader and collecting the "Fetters Power" can we save the world!

Battle with your companions!

Build a balanced team and engage in thrilling 4v4 battles where type effectiveness plays a pivotal role. With 21 unique types - Normal, Grass, Water, Fire, Electric, Ice, Bug, Ground, Rock, Dark, Fighting, Flying, Flying, Steel, Psychic, Dragon, Poison, Ghost, Fairy, Dark, and Light - create your ultimate battle formation!

Complete the archive and become the PA Master!

Embark on main quests, side missions, and thrilling battles to capture PAs from around the world as companions! With nearly 200 original PAs waiting to fill your Archive, this is your chance to satisfy your inner collector's spirit!

A lighthearted and witty story, along with powerful opponents!

Journey into a virtual video game world where bosses wield the power of badges! Defeat them, collect their strength, and unlock the Space-Time Gate to save both virtual and real worlds. Unknown challenges await. And not to mention... the legendary, mysterious PA!

Notes

  • We are aware that some Shiny Pets have texture glitches. You can resolve this by removing them from your inventory. This will not affect your game progress.
